candidate_summary: 7-dastgāh sequential mastery T_1..T_7 + 5-āvāz extension T_8..T_12 with tier-completion gate; gushe-unit 30-50 fine sub-unit progression; maktab K-cohort distillation; single-passage masterclass focus; memorization-to-bedāheh gate with sampling disabled until M_mem≥τ_mem.

results.name: CoTCD Chain-of-Thought Curriculum Distillation 2025
results.rationale: Curriculum + distillation overlap with maktab cohort distillation, but no tiered dastgāh sequence, no gushe sub-units, no memorization-to-improvisation gate.

results.name: PCL Prompt Curriculum Learning Post-Training
results.rationale: Prompt-level curriculum for post-training shares progression idea but lacks 12-tier sequential mastery, gushe fine-grained sub-units, K-cohort master-student distillation, and memorization gate before improvisation.

results.name: POCL Progressive Overload Curriculum
results.rationale: Progressive overload curriculum overlaps with sequential tier-progression but lacks the 7+5 dastgāh/āvāz tier structure, gushe sub-unit single-passage focus, maktab cohort distillation, and bedāheh sampling-disabled gate.

results.name: OPSD On-Policy Self-Distilled Reasoner
results.rationale: Self-distillation differs from master-LLM-to-K-students maktab distillation; no tiered mastery ladder, no gushe sub-units, no memorization-to-bedāheh gate.

results.name: TSCL Task-Structured Curriculum Multi-Task
results.rationale: Task-structured curriculum has structural similarity but lacks 12 sequential tier order, gushe fine-grained 30-50 sub-unit progression, K-cohort distillation, masterclass single-passage focus, and improvisation-gate.

results.name: AMID α-Mixture Knowledge Distillation
results.rationale: Mixture-coefficient KD differs from K-cohort maktab distillation with ablation-by-correction; no tier ladder, no gushe sub-units, no memorization gate.

results.name: Memory LLM Mechanisms Evaluation Evolution
results.rationale: Memory mechanism evaluation has tangential link to memorization-gate concept but is descriptive evaluation, not a training method with tier ladder, gushe sub-units, cohort distillation, or sampling-disabled gate.

results.name: Measuring Memorization NAACL 2025
results.rationale: Memorization measurement paper only weakly relates to M_mem≥τ_mem gate; no curriculum tiers, gushe units, maktab cohort distillation, or improvisation gating mechanism.

decision_rationale: No result reaches kw>=2, sem>=0.7, or func>=0.7. All 8 results share at most one shallow keyword (curriculum, distillation, or memorization) but none combine the radif-specific composite: 12-tier dastgāh/āvāz sequential mastery + 30-50 gushe sub-unit progression + K-cohort maktab master-student distillation + single-passage masterclass focus + memorization-to-bedāheh sampling-disabled gate. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on POCL + CoTCD + TSCL + PCL adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E aggregate-adjacency vs per-paper scoring).
